allow: Bash(gh pr create --title "docs: rewrite README to reflect realtime dashboard operations" --body "Substitui o README genérico pelo documento operacional real do NEØ Dashboard. Bash(gh api repos/NEO-PROTOCOL/neo-dashboard/pulls/7/reviews --method POST --field body="Codex bug addressed in commit fb2b548: added \\`nodes.length > 0\\` guard after every post-filter return across Source 1 \(local-file\) and all three response-shape branches of Source 2 \(nexus-api\). Source 3 was already correct. The cascade will now fall through correctly if a source yields zero non-excluded nodes." --field event="COMMENT")
